title: JobScraper
tagline: Playwright browser automation with route optimization
description: A Python scraping engine that uses Playwright to automate browser sessions and extract fiber installation job data. Orchestrates 8-16 concurrent browser workers with async task management, parses job text into structured data, and feeds results into a VRPTW route optimizer powered by a VROOM solver with OSRM routing and Nominatim geocoding backends.
features: Playwright browser automation with 8-16 concurrent worker orchestration
Job text parsing and structured data extraction pipeline
VRPTW route optimization via self-hosted VROOM solver
Self-hosted geocoding (Nominatim) and routing (OSRM) backends
Strategy pattern for swappable geocoding/routing backends with cloud fallbacks
795+ automated tests with comprehensive coverage

title: TerpTracker
description: A cannabis terpene profile analyzer with a FastAPI backend and Next.js 14 frontend. Aggregates data from multiple sources through a multi-stage pipeline and uses cosine-similarity to predict user preferences based on strain ratings.
features: Multi-source data pipeline: scraping, COA parsing, database lookup, API, merge, classify
Cosine-similarity preference predictions from user strain ratings
Next.js 14 frontend with server components and TypeScript
235+ backend tests and full frontend test coverage with Vitest
Optional user accounts with personalized recommendation engine

title: Action Jackson Installs
tagline: Full-featured business platform with scheduling and invoicing
description: A dual-domain Express.js application serving both a business site and developer portfolio. Features an equipment catalog with smart recommendations, an advanced scheduling system with conflict detection, a professional invoicing system, and S3-compatible file storage via MinIO.
features: Dual-domain routing for business and portfolio content
Advanced scheduling with conflict detection and email confirmations
Equipment catalog with speed-tier-based smart recommendations
Professional invoicing with quote-to-invoice conversion
S3-compatible file storage with security controls and audit trails

title: Cloudflare Tunnel Manager
tagline: Zero-touch tunnel routing from Docker labels
description: A single-file Python service that watches Docker events and automatically manages Cloudflare Tunnel ingress rules, DNS records, and Zero Trust Access applications. Containers opt in with Docker labels for seamless, zero-touch public access.
features: Automatic ingress rule and DNS record management from Docker labels
Zero Trust Access policy provisioning with Google sign-in support
Real-time Docker event watching for instant route updates
Single-file deployment with minimal dependencies

title: Repo Manager
tagline: Automated GitHub repo syncing with a single command
description: A Bash CLI tool for cloning, tracking, and auto-syncing GitHub repositories. Supports cron-based scheduled syncs with flock concurrency protection, stash-based dirty-tree handling, and a clean status dashboard.
features: Clone and track repos with a single command
Cron-based auto-sync with flock concurrency safety
Smart sync: stash dirty trees, fast-forward merge, restore stash
Interactive status dashboard for all tracked repositories

title: Developer Portfolio
tagline: Dark-themed portfolio with PDF resume export
description: This portfolio site, built with Next.js 14 and Tailwind CSS. Features a professional dark theme, animated page transitions with Framer Motion, project showcases, and a downloadable PDF resume.
features: Next.js 14 App Router with server and client components
Responsive dark theme with Tailwind CSS
Animated transitions and interactions via Framer Motion
PDF resume generation and download

title: CalendarBuddy
tagline: Web portal that wraps and automates desktop tools
description: A multi-user web platform that wraps three desktop automation tools — JobScraper (browser-based job scraping), Spreader (route optimization and Contractor assignment), and ASSigner (contractor job parsing + processing) — into a unified, automated portal. Built with FastAPI, Celery, and Redis to orchestrate background execution of each tool, with SSE progress streaming, multi-user auth, and a calendar dashboard.
features: Orchestrates JobScraper, Spreader, and ASSigner as background tasks
Celery + Redis task queue for automated tool execution
SSE-based real-time progress streaming per tool run
Multi-user authentication with Argon2 hashing
Calendar dashboard with color-coded freshness indicators
Excel and TXT export with admin dashboard

title: ASSigner
tagline: Desktop automation for parsing and assigning 100+ contractor jobs nightly
description: A desktop automation tool that parses and assigns over 100 contractor jobs nightly. Built with pure Python, Tkinter GUI, Playwright browser automation, and Pandas. Features 8 contractor-specific format parsers, drag-and-drop GUI, fuzzy name matching, email integration via IMAP, and PyInstaller .exe distribution.
features: 8 contractor-specific format parsers for diverse job data
Drag-and-drop Tkinter GUI for manual assignment overrides
Fuzzy name matching for contractor identification
Email integration via IMAP for automated job intake
PyInstaller .exe distribution for non-technical users
198 automated tests covering all parsers and workflows

title: BrowseShield
tagline: Browser extension for real-time website security assessments
description: A browser extension and web portal for real-time website security assessments. Built with JavaScript (Manifest V3), Node.js/Express, and PostgreSQL. Mizzou Capstone project featuring visual risk indicators, confidence scoring, multi-user family accounts, and a password strength checker.
features: Manifest V3 browser extension with real-time risk analysis
Visual risk indicators with confidence scoring
Multi-user family accounts with shared protection
Password strength checker and security recommendations
Web portal for account management and history

title: MaybeMap
tagline: Transform Excel spreadsheets into professional regional maps
description: A Python tool that transforms Excel spreadsheets into professional regional maps. Uses Geoapify geocoding, Folium, and OSMnx for mapping. Features smart label placement with a zero-overlap guarantee, numbered dense areas, and outputs both interactive HTML and high-res PNG maps.
features: Excel-to-map pipeline with automatic geocoding
Smart label placement with zero-overlap guarantee
Numbered dense area handling for crowded regions
Interactive HTML map output with pan and zoom
High-resolution PNG export for print and presentations

title: Pokedex
tagline: iOS Pokedex app with browsing and detailed Pokémon info
description: An iOS Pokedex app built in Swift. Originally a course final project with continued updates. Features Pokémon browsing, detailed info display, and comprehensive unit and UI tests.
features: Browse and search Pokémon by name or number
Detailed Pokémon info display with stats and types
Unit and UI test coverage

title: DebtCalculator
tagline: .NET desktop app for tracking and calculating debt payoff
description: A .NET/WPF desktop application for tracking and calculating debt payoff strategies. Built with C#. Features credit card and loan minimum payment calculations, user profiles, and a hamburger navigation UI.
features: Credit card minimum payment calculations
Loan payoff tracking and projections
User profiles for managing multiple debt scenarios
Hamburger navigation UI for clean desktop experience
